_comment: Copy to <NewPC>/Game init files/character_world_state.json — fill on character creation; prior campaigns are lore only unless player_knowledge says otherwise.

inherited_lore.player_knowledge: DM: bullet what this PC has actually heard about prior arcs (may be wrong, vague, or nothing).
inherited_lore.dm_only_crossover_hooks: Optional: ways to meet Kenji/Amaris geography or NPCs without breaking their canon.

new_region.from_worlds_middle: Where it sits vs the 'middle' (girdle / heartland) — see shared_world_continuity.md § Description map
new_region.from_crown_realm: Where it sits vs the Crown realm (inside kingdom, border, beyond — vs Varenholm heartland)
new_region.travel_time_to_major_hub: e.g. 3 weeks to Varenholm by road — DM sets
new_region.on_map_note: One sentence for realm_lore_registry + optional addition to shared_world_continuity.md description map

main_cast.role: ally | mentor | merchant | antagonist | foil | other
main_cast.voice_hook: speech tick or attitude in one line

mechanical_state._merge_note: StoryEngine (Kenji ttrpg_game_engine.py) preserves unknown top-level keys on save. Merge this file with kenji_state.example.json in one JSON if you use the GUI — universe / inherited_lore / new_region blocks round-trip as extended state.
